strategy: Solo-friendly (15,935 health, no minions). Hit with Myth, Life, or Death (all +30%); he resists Balance 70% and everything else 40%.
His only cheat fires every third round: a random hanging effect (DoT, shield, blade, trap, HoT, or -50% heal charm) followed by a random summon or hit like Krampus, Goat Monk, or a Headless Horseman.
Use rounds 1 and 2 to blade and Feint, then land your hit, timing big hits to avoid feeding the round-3 summon a fresh target.
Carry Triage for the possible 462 Fire DoT and Cleanse Charm for the -50% healing charm.
Stack blades onto a single strong hit and burst him between his third-round cheats.
cheatNotes: Every third round he casts a random hanging effect and then a random summon or attack spell.
